framework.name: AI Agent Pricing Tier Model
framework.description: Three-tier pricing framework for AI agent development: Rule-based/simple ML ($5K-$25K), moderate ML agents ($25K-$80K), and enterprise Gen AI autonomous agents ($100K-$500K+). Each tier represents a non-linear increase in complexity, not just features, because agents must decide which capabilities to use.
framework.raw_quote: For a simple rule-based bot, US-based AI developers usually charge $5,000–$25,000. Moderately advanced machine learning agents cost $25,000–$80,000 to develop. Enterprise-grade generative AI agents... $100,000–$500,000 (and counting).
